bindings.grid_intro: A compact grid for fast political takeaways, headline numbers, and supporting context.
bindings.fact_1_body: Housing and rent lead the sample as the most selected concern.
bindings.fact_2_body: Support moved upward compared with the previous benchmark.
bindings.fact_3_body: Healthcare access remains one of the strongest secondary issues.
bindings.fact_4_body: The preview simulates a pipeline summary metric for review.
bindings.bottom_note: Example grid facts preview. Figures are placeholders for layout review only.
